[Wed 2026-04-01 22:17 GMT+8] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: Continue the current ACTIVE_TASK from /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/checklists/ACTIVE_TASK.md.

Current:
- 修复微博简报：取消“财经内容”筛除，只做汇总与分析

Next:
- 定位产出“财经大V每日简报 / 财经内容0条”的汇总脚本并删除过滤口径
- 回归生成一份 dry-run 简报，确认非财经微博也会进入汇总
- 提交修复并汇报触发根因与后续约束

Requirements:
- Work inside /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace
- Update ACTIVE_TASK.md Current/Next/Completed/Evidence as you make progress
- If code changes are made, git commit them in the workspace
- Prefer producing a concrete artifact (new file / script result / commit) before reporting
- If completed, summarize the root cause, files changed, report path, and commit hash
